title: Charter Synthesis CLI JSON Envelope
description: Stable contract for stdout of `spec-kitty charter synthesize ... --json`. The four contracted fields are required on every success and dry-run envelope. Legacy compatibility fields are permitted but not required.

result.description: Outcome label. 'dry_run' is used only when the run was invoked with --dry-run.

id.description: Stable identifier of the synthesis adapter (e.g. 'fixture').

version.description: Adapter version string (semver, model name, or snapshot identifier).

written_artifacts.description: Artifacts staged or promoted by this run. May be empty. For result == 'dry_run', byte-equal entries to what a real run with the same SynthesisRequest would produce. Sourced from typed staged-artifact entries; never derived from kind:slug reconstruction.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings (e.g. evidence-gathering warnings). Stored inside the envelope so callers reading only stdout still see them. May be empty.

path.description: Repo-relative POSIX path of the staged-or-promoted artifact. For result == 'dry_run', byte-equal to the path the non-dry-run would write.

slug.description: Slug component used in the artifact filename.

artifact_id.description: Concrete artifact identifier. Non-null for kinds that carry an ID. MUST NOT be the placeholder 'PROJECT_000' on user-visible output.
